metric: Two-Wheeler Industry Segment Mix (% of domestic units)
source: SIAM annual flash reports — body-type splits (Motorcycles · Scooters · Mopeds · 3W stripped from Vahan/SIAM 2W aggregate)
notes: Values are widely-cited SIAM annual figures. Mopeds includes TVS XL100 family. Three-wheeler share excluded from total — the four-segment row sums to ~100% with small rounding.
